# Finca Escondida – Demo Site by Rideko Webdesign

> This is a demonstration website created by Rideko Webdesign (rideko.nl) to showcase what a modern, high-end website can look like for a luxury villa hire business. Finca Escondida is a fictional private estate in Ibiza. The demo serves as an example for businesses in the luxury travel, hospitality and villa rental sector.

The demo presents a fully functional, visually refined one-page website for an exclusive Ibiza villa. Lightning-fast, mobile-first and built to impress — created with the modern Rideko stack.

Interested in a similar website? Contact Rideko Webdesign at https://www.rideko.nl/contact

## About the demo

- [Finca Escondida demo](https://finca.rideko.nl): Full demo page for a fictional luxury villa hire business in San Carlos, Ibiza.

## More Rideko demos

- [All demos](https://www.rideko.nl/demos): Overview of all Rideko demonstration websites by industry.

## More

- [llms-full.txt](https://finca.rideko.nl/llms-full.txt): Full content and technical details of this demo in a single file.
